findings.description: customerId/accountId UUIDs and Redis cache keys logged unmasked across 4 files at DEBUG/WARN — PDPA §22 violation.
findings.verification: All call sites now wrap the bound argument in LogMasking.maskId(UUID/String) or LogMasking.maskKey(String). Unit tests in LogMaskingTest assert FULL_UUID_PATTERN is NEVER present in the masked output. LogMasking has no domain-layer imports (only java.util.UUID).

findings.description: No Logback masking filter present; defense-in-depth against future PII log additions absent.
findings.verification: logback-spring.xml created with profile-aware appenders (dev/default, staging, prod). Both full-UUID regex ([0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}) and 10-16 digit sequence regex (\b\d{10,16}\b) applied via Logback <replace> in all three profiles. TODO comment references OBS-042 ticket for observability-lib MaskingConverter migration.

findings.description: JWT in sessionStorage — XSS-recoverable. No XSS sinks in feature.
findings.remediation: Backlog ticket BC-DEBT-002 — migrate to HttpOnly cookie + BFF in v1.1. Accepted risk for demo.

findings.description: Privacy notice / consent UI deferred post-demo.
findings.remediation: Tracked as C-1. No action for G8.

findings.description: Future rate-limiting must be at ingress on JWT sub, NOT X-Forwarded-For at app layer.
findings.remediation: DevOps P1 NetworkPolicy spec carries this constraint.

controls_met: N/A — no PAN, CVV, or cardholder data crosses this service

gdpr.lawful_basis: performance of contract (account ownership) + legitimate interest (security audit)
gdpr.retention: logs: 90 days (DevOps log-shipper policy); audit Kafka topic: 7 years (regulatory)
gdpr.consent_withdrawal: deferred to v1.1 — tracked as C-1 / F-4

stride_summary.information_disclosure: pass — F-1+F-2 now resolved (call-site mask + logback safety net)

metadata.notes: Both blocking findings (F-1 HIGH PII-in-logs, F-2 MEDIUM missing logback masking) verified resolved by refactoring iteration 3. C-2 (audit metadata-only) and C-3 (single X-Customer-Id reader) invariants preserved — AuditEventRecord.java and IborCheckFilter.java untouched. No new findings introduced. G8 PASS.
backlog_carry_forward: BC-DEBT-002 — Migrate FE JWT storage to HttpOnly cookie + BFF (v1.1)
OBS-042 — Ship observability-lib MaskingConverter; replace inline <replace> regex in logback-spring.xml
C-1 — Privacy notice / consent UI (deferred to v1.1)
